name: Ratti S.p.A.
summary: Ratti S.p.A. manufactures and distributes fabrics and accessories for men and women in Italy and internationally. The company offers printed, plain, yarn-dyed, and jacquard fabrics for women's ready-to-wear, beachwear, underwear, and handbags, as well as headscarves, shawls, and scarves; and printed, plain, and jacquard fabrics for men's shirts, ready-to-wear, and beachwear, as well as designs and produces accessories, such as scarves, ties, fabrics for bags, and garment prints. It also provides furnishings, including upholstery, curtain, cushion, and home d√É¬©cor fabrics, as well as furnishing fabrics for hotels, showrooms, and stores. Ratti S.p.A. was founded in 1945 and is based in Guanzate, Italy.
